top_patterns.description: Starts with a straightforward statement, often includes a hashtag.
example_quotes: Step down heel feature on #meetthepaseos is perfect for airport travel

top_patterns.description: Expresses personal feelings, gratitude, or milestones.
example_quotes: Happy Mother's Day mom. I love u so much!
proud parent to a company and #OneforOne movement that turns 7 today!

top_patterns.description: Shares ongoing or recent activities, often with location or context.
example_quotes: Just arrived to Mexico ready for my buddy Pete's wedding celebration! Margarita's in hands.
proud parent to a company and #OneforOne movement that turns 7 today!
Giving the commencement speech at Pepperdine and getting my 1st degree wearing @TOMS shades

archetypal_structures.emotional_job: Share personal moments, connect with community
example_quotes: My family & I on the first "shoe drop" circa 2007. I am genuinely so excited about bringing 50 @TOMS fans in to the field on a Giving Trip this year, and having them be part of the TOMS family! #tickettogive
My grandpa turned 90, defying all the health tips I have ever heard or followed

bridge_phrases: A friend just texted this to me
language_habits.sentence_length_profile: Mostly short, punchy sentences, often under 10 words
language_habits.line_break_style: Minimal line breaks, often single sentences or brief phrases

example_quotes: Happy Mother's Day mom. I love u so much!
proud parent to a company and #OneforOne movement that turns 7 today!
Just arrived to Mexico ready for my buddy Pete's wedding celebration! Margarita's in hands.

synthesis_notes.what_this_batch_says_about_current_voice: Consistent, personal, and activity-focused with emotional undertones
synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: More direct, less verbose, more community and milestone emphasis
